title: ChangePlan (Action Contract)
description: Plan Mode output — the signed, schema-validated Action Contract gating write tools, dependency install, and git commit per Algorithm §5.2. No Action Contract, no write.
$comment: compat_class: closed, signed: true. Authority: approved plan §2 domain row 1 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5); docs/specs/SAENA_AEO_Algorithm_and_Harness_Design_v1.md §5.2:249-278 (field skeleton); §5.4 Plan Gate. contract_hash is intentionally NOT a member of this schema — it is a self-reference that would have to be computed over its own containing document (self-reference avoidance); it is carried instead by ApprovalDecision.contract_hash and PatchArtifact.contract_hash, and referenced by the plan.contract.* events (k3s §4.2 ActionContractProposed.contract_hash). Canonicalization method (JCS) that would produce that hash is an explicitly pre-W2A ADR (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §7 W1 밖 승계 OPEN, 'JCS 정준화 ADR'). tenant_id/engine_scope/approval_required/no_deploy/no_push/evidence_ledger_hash/scope_limits/diff_budget/rejected_alternatives are field-level additions beyond the Algorithm §5.2 skeleton, confirmed by 사용자 결정 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.2 items 3-4, H-3/H-7).

tenant_id.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:254 'customer_id' — renamed to tenant_id per Lead 룰링 R7 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.1), authority ADR-0024 (W1 contract deviations, customer_id 개명). Uses the shared core-identifier tenant_id $def rather than a locally redeclared field, per single-authority identifier convention (ADR-0011/ADR-0014) — avoids the duplication ADR-0014 forbids.

repo_commit.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:255 'repo_commit' — 'immutable SHA'. Uses git_sha (40-hex) $def, matching PatchArtifact.base_commit.

approved_scope.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:256 'approved_scope' — array of glob-like scope strings (e.g. 'apps/web/docs/*'). Glob-breadth validation itself is not schema-expressible; see scope_limits.max_globs $comment below.

engine_scope.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:257 'engine_scope' — array of engine-id root values. v1 closed enum ['chatgpt-search'] per common/engine-id/v1 and CLAUDE.md Engine scope (Google/Gemini disabled).

evidence_ids.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:262 'evidence_ids'. minItems 1 enforces Prompt package §5 'every material claim must be evidence-linked' at the hypothesis level.

predicted_layers.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:263 'predicted_layers' — the 5 AEO outcome layers (Prompt package layer taxonomy).

expected_effect_distribution.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:264 'expected_effect_distribution' e.g. {"p_7d": 0.42} — open key set (horizon labels), numeric values only.

patch_units.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:268-276 'patch_units' array skeleton — 1 unit = 1 rollback boundary.

allowed_transformations.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:272 'allowed_transformations' — Execution Gate allowlisted operation set for this patch unit (§5.4 Execution Gate).

tests.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:273 'tests' — patch-unit-specific test identifiers (test-first principle, CLAUDE.md operating principle 8).

approval_required.$comment: Algorithm §5.2:277 'approval_required' — always true; no Action Contract instance may declare itself pre-approved (Plan Gate, §5.4).

no_deploy.$comment: CLAUDE.md operating principle 10 ('배포·push·merge 금지') encoded as a structural invariant; also security-model.md 'deployment credentials never in FORGE'.

no_push.$comment: CLAUDE.md operating principle 10 ('배포·push·merge 금지') encoded as a structural invariant.

evidence_ledger_hash.$comment: H-3 (security-model.md '근거 고정 (H-3)': 'Action Contract에 evidence_ledger_hash + scope glob 상한 + diff 예산'). 사용자 확정 required (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.2 item 3). Anchors the evidence set referenced by hypotheses[].evidence_ids to an immutable ledger snapshot.

max_globs.$comment: H-3 scope glob 상한 (security-model.md). Glob-breadth (how permissive a single glob pattern is, e.g. '**/*') is not itself schema-expressible — that policy check is enforced at the W2A policy-gate, not here; this field only caps the COUNT of approved_scope entries.

scope_limits.$comment: H-3 (security-model.md, docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.2 item 3, 사용자 확정 required).

diff_budget.$comment: H-3 diff 예산 (security-model.md, docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.2 item 3, 사용자 확정 required).

rejected_alternatives.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 1 field list — records alternatives considered and rejected during Plan Mode, for critic/audit review. minItems 0 permitted (may legitimately be empty when no alternatives were surfaced).
